XSLT/xsl:message/terminate.name: terminate
XSLT/xsl:message/terminate.description: Set toyes, indicates that execution should be terminated. The default value isno, in which case the message is output and execution continues.

info.excerpt: Set toyes, indicates that execution should be terminated. The default value isno, in which case the message is output and execution continues.

XSLT/xsl:if/test.name: test
XSLT/xsl:if/test.description: Contains an XPath expression that can be evaluated (using the rules defined forboolean( )if necessary) to a Boolean value. If the value is true, the template is processed; if it is not, no action is t

info.excerpt: Contains an XPath expression that can be evaluated (using the rules defined forboolean( )if necessary) to a Boolean value. If the value is true, the template is processed; if it is not, no action is t

XSLT/xsl:when/test.name: test
XSLT/xsl:when/test.description: Specifies a boolean expression to be evaluated. If true, the contents of the element are processed; if false, they are ignored.

info.excerpt: Specifies a boolean expression to be evaluated. If true, the contents of the element are processed; if false, they are ignored.
